case_title: JUANA IRMA GUILLEN VS. CHARLES BYRD

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-03-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-03-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUILLEN, JUANA IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT BYRD, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE;REQUEST FOR NEW COURT DATE;ALSO, ADDRESS UPDATE ON DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, JUANA IRMA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED MAR-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BYRD, CHARLES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, JUANA IRMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BYRD, CHARLES THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT WAS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE PROPERTY MANAGER, AND DOES NOT HAVE ANY PERSONAL LIABILITY.
